title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEVERE WEATHER UMATILLA COUNTY NEIGHBOR 2 NEIGHBOR PENDLETON WARMING STATION OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures drop below 32 degrees. Rain and wind chill is factored in. 715 SE Court Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older. Service animals are allowed. Hours: -Open 7 days per week 6:30pm-7am, Saturday November 15, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below -Intake 6:30pm-7pm on nights when shelter is open Email (458) 300-3199 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER UMATILLA COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
